q: Fluid is a substance that offers no permanent _______ to deforming forces. [cite: 2]
Fluid is a substance that offers no permanent resistance to _______ forces. [cite: 2]
The study of fluids has two parts, the statics and the _______. [cite: 2]
The fluid _______ concentrates on the fluids at rest. [cite: 2]
The fluid _______ concerns with the fluid in motion. [cite: 2]
The study of the flow of liquid is called _______. [cite: 2]
The study of liquid at rest is called _______. [cite: 2]
The relation between the volume and the pressure of a gas obeys _______ law. [cite: 2]
The relation between the volume and the temperature of a gas obeys _______ law. [cite: 2]
The volume of a liquid does not depend on the pressure if the _______ is constant. [cite: 2]
In the flow of the fluids, the path or the flow of the fluid particles is called _______. [cite: 2]
If the fluid particles are moving steady in smooth paths in layers, it is a _______ flow. [cite: 2]
If each layer of the fluid moves smoothly past the adjacent layers with no mixing, it is a _______ flow. [cite: 2]
In _______ flow, the streamlines do not cross each other. [cite: 2]
If the flow or the path of the fluid particles is irregular, it is _______ flow. [cite: 2]
If the flow or the path of the fluid particles is always changing their directions, it is _______ flow. [cite: 2]
If the flow or the path of the fluid particles is always whirling, it is _______ flow. [cite: 2]
In _______ flow, the speed of the fluid at a point is continuously undergoing changes in both the magnitude and the direction. [cite: 2]
The internal friction in the fluids is called _______. [cite: 2]
For ideal laminar fluid flow, the viscosity is _______. [cite: 2]
The flow of an ideal fluid flow is a _______ flow. [cite: 2]
The equation, A₁v₁ = A₂v₂ is the continuity equation for _______ fluid flow. [cite: 2]
The speed of water spraying from a hose increases by making the hose area _______. [cite: 2]
The speed of water spraying from a hose decreases by making the hose area _______. [cite: 2]
Bernoulli's equation can be derived using the _______ principle to a fluid flowing in a tube. [cite: 2]
If the volume flow rate through x cm diameter pipe is 2 m³s⁻¹, the volume flow rate through 2x cm diameter of the same pipe is _______. [cite: 2]
The difference in the _______ of the airflow causes a pressure difference above and below the wing of a flying plane. [cite: 2]
The pressure above the wing of a flying plane is _______ than the pressure below the wing. [cite: 2]
The difference in pressures above and below the wing of a flying plane provides a _______ on the wing. [cite: 2]
When the piston of the sprayer is pressed, the fast moving air causes a _______ pressure at the tip of the nozzle. [cite: 2]
When the piston of the sprayer is pressed, the liquid inside the container is at a _______ pressure. [cite: 2]
The _______ effect is a particular manifestation of Bernoulli's theorem. [cite: 2]
The _______ effect is commonly associated with a spinning object moving through a fluid. [cite: 2]
The ball spinning through the air drags some of the _______ around it. [cite: 2]
The deflection of the spinning ball passing through a fluid due to different pressures is known as the _______ effect. [cite: 2]
The resistance to fluid motion is analogous to _______ when a solid moves on a surface. [cite: 2]
The resistance to fluid motion is called _______. [cite: 2]
The internal resistance of the fluid is called _______. [cite: 2]
Viscosity arises when there is _______ motion between layers of the fluid. [cite: 2]
The viscosity of liquids _______ rapidly with an increase in temperature. [cite: 2]
The viscosity of gases _______ with an increase in temperature. [cite: 2]
The SI unit of viscosity is _______. [cite: 2]
The unit of viscosity other than pascal second is _______. [cite: 2]
There are _______ ways to measure the fluid's viscosity. [cite: 2]
The _______ viscosity is the fluid's resistance to flow due to an external force. [cite: 2]
The _______ viscosity is the resistive flow of a fluid due to gravity. [cite: 2]
The _______ viscosity is also known as absolute viscosity. [cite: 2]
The shear stress is the _______ force per unit area. [cite: 2]
The _______ is the ratio of the shearing stress to the velocity gradient. [cite: 2]
Stokes' law expresses the drag force resisting the fall of small spherical objects through a fluid medium under the influence of _______. [cite: 2]
